title: Peruvian-Style Spicy Peruvian nduja Anticuchos
description: A vibrant and spicy dish featuring spherified nduja in the traditional Peruvian street food form of anticuchos, served in a hot pot vessel for a fun and interactive dining experience.
instructions: Combine nduja and sugar in a food processor and mix until smooth.
Add water and process until fully incorporated.
Spherify mixture using sodium alginate and calcium chloride.
Thread potato slices onto skewers and grill until slightly charred.
Heat oil in a hot pot vessel over medium-high heat.
Add spherified nduja mixture to the hot oil and cook until crispy.
Serve anticuchos in the hot pot vessel with the spherified nduja and a side of spicy aioli for dipping.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and a sprinkle of paprika.
